Replace Arrays.asList() with List.of() for creating immutable lists.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.why_exists: While Arrays.asList still compiles, List.of is the preferred modern Java 9+ API for immutable lists, aligning with JDK 17 best practices.
